dialogs.description: Donut decided that this whole adventuring stuff is not what she wants to spend her precious lifetime with.
Donut leaves the dungeon and starts a career in shoplifting
You can now close the game. Donut is off to do better things with her life

options.description: But I want to continue playing! :(
Wow Donut is so cool I wish to achieve as much in Life as she has...

dialogs.description: Exit the Game by pressing 'Q' or 'ESC'. Goodbye. Please don't make this more awkward than it already is...
You will never be as good as Donut, Please go now. Close the door with 'Q' or 'ESC'.
